ignored-keywords.label: Ignored Keywords
ignored-keywords.helpText: Comma-separated list of keywords to ignore during scans (e.g. joke, sarcasm, meme).

target-flairs.label: Target Post Flairs
target-flairs.helpText: Comma-separated list of flairs to prioritize (e.g. Guide, Resource, Question).

min-score-threshold.label: Minimum Score Threshold
min-score-threshold.helpText: Minimum score for automatic nomination consideration.

watch-enabled.label: Watch mode
watch-enabled.helpText: Automatically add posts and comments that pass filters to the Desk.

discover-existing-enabled.label: Discover existing posts
discover-existing-enabled.helpText: Scan top/hot/best posts already on the subreddit and add high-signal ones to the Desk (uses the same score, keyword, and flair filters as watch mode).

discover-listing.label: Discover listing
discover-listing.helpText: Which subreddit listing to scan when discovering existing posts.

discover-timeframe.label: Discover timeframe (top only)
discover-timeframe.helpText: Time window when using the Top listing.

discover-limit.label: Discover batch size
discover-limit.helpText: How many posts to examine per discover scan (max 100).

discover-on-install.label: Discover on install
discover-on-install.helpText: Run one discover scan when the app is installed or upgraded (requires Discover existing posts).

discover-schedule-enabled.label: Scheduled discover scans
discover-schedule-enabled.helpText: Run discover scans automatically every 12 hours (requires Discover existing posts). Can also be toggled in the app Settings tab.

autonomy-level.label: Autonomy dial
autonomy-level.helpText: How much ModScribe does without a mod: suggest category → auto-categorize → auto-draft → merge/split proposals.

ai-provider.label: AI Provider
ai-provider.helpText: Choose how ModScribe generates wiki drafts. Set OpenAI or Gemini, then save your API key below (verified on save).

api-key.label: AI API Key
api-key.helpText: API key for the selected provider. Reddit calls OpenAI or Gemini on save to confirm the key works.

items.label: Nominate for Wiki
items.description: Capture this post or comment as a wiki draft candidate
